title: loroglossum caprinum
intro: Loroglossum caprinum, also known as Goat's Beard or Goat's Beards, is a flowering plant in the orchid family that grows in Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Loroglossum caprinum include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Loroglossum caprinum include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water.
